category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China PV Inverter Export to Saudi Arabia: SASO / SABER Certification and Grid-Connection Requirements Comparison (2026)
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口沙特阿拉伯：SASO / SABER 认证与并网要求对照（2026）
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口沙特阿拉伯：SASO / SABER 認證與併網要求對照（2026）

description.en: Gap matrix comparing mandatory Saudi Arabia SASO/SABER requirements (SABER PCoC/SCoC, SASO IEC 62109 inverter safety, SEC grid connection, Arabic labelling) against certificates commonly held by Chinese manufacturers. All data cells are [UNVERIFIED] — for reference only; verify against official SASO/SABER sources before use.
description.zh: 对照沙特 SASO/SABER 强制要求（SABER PCoC/SCoC、SASO IEC 62109 逆变器安全、SEC 并网、阿拉伯语标签）与中国厂商常见持有证书的差距矩阵。所有数据单元均为 [UNVERIFIED]，仅供参考，使用前须以 SASO/SABER 官方资料核实。
description.zht: 對照沙特 SASO/SABER 強制要求（SABER PCoC/SCoC、SASO IEC 62109 逆變器安全、SEC 並網、阿拉伯語標籤）與中國廠商常見持有證書的差距矩陣。所有資料單元均為 [UNVERIFIED]，僅供參考，使用前須以 SASO/SABER 官方資料核實。

disclaimer.en: This page compiles publicly available official requirements for reference only. It does not constitute legal, testing, or certification advice. All data cells are marked [UNVERIFIED] and must be independently verified against current official SASO/SABER publications before reliance. Requirements change; always consult the official SASO and SABER portals.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅整理官方公开要求，供参考用途，不构成法律、检测或认证意见。所有数据单元均标注 [UNVERIFIED]，依赖前必须依据 SASO/SABER 最新官方文件独立核实。要求随时可能变动，请以 SASO 及 SABER 官方平台为准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅整理官方公開要求，供參考用途，不構成法律、檢測或認證意見。所有資料單元均標註 [UNVERIFIED]，依賴前必須依據 SASO/SABER 最新官方文件獨立核實。要求隨時可能變動，請以 SASO 及 SABER 官方平台為準。

answer_first.en: SABER PCoC/SCoC, SASO IEC 62109 evidence, Arabic labelling, and Saudi 60 Hz grid-connection approval are the major gaps beyond common Chinese and CE-oriented inverter files.
answer_first.zh: SABER PCoC/SCoC、SASO IEC 62109 证明、阿拉伯语标签以及沙特 60 Hz 并网批准，是中国及面向 CE 的常见逆变器文件之外的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: SABER PCoC/SCoC、SASO IEC 62109 證明、阿拉伯語標籤以及沙特 60 Hz 併網批准，是中國及面向 CE 的常見逆變器文件之外的主要差距。

requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入注册（SABER PCoC / SCoC）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入登記（SABER PCoC / SCoC）

summary.en: Registration on the SABER platform is required. Products must obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) issued by a SASO-designated conformity body. Each shipment additionally requires a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC). [UNVERIFIED — verify current HS scope and PCoC vs self-declaration pathway at saber.sa]
summary.zh: 须在 SABER 平台完成注册，由 SASO 指定合格评定机构颁发产品符合证书（PCoC）；每批次货物还须取得装运符合证书（SCoC）。[UNVERIFIED — 请在 saber.sa 核实当前 HS 适用范围及 PCoC 与自我声明路径]
summary.zht: 須在 SABER 平台完成登記，由 SASO 指定合格評定機構頒發產品符合證書（PCoC）；每批次貨物還須取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）。[UNVERIFIED — 請在 saber.sa 核實當前 HS 適用範圍及 PCoC 與自我聲明路徑]

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers typically hold no SABER registration; no equivalent mandatory pre-export registration exists in China for this product category.
summary.zh: 中国厂商通常未在 SABER 平台注册；中国对该品类无对应的强制出口前注册要求。
summary.zht: 中國廠商通常未在 SABER 平台登記；中國對該品類無對應的強制出口前登記要求。

gap.en: Must obtain SABER registration + PCoC + per-shipment SCoC; no Chinese equivalent. Action required before export.
gap.zh: 须办理 SABER 注册 + PCoC + 每批 SCoC；中国无对应要求，出口前必须完成。
gap.zht: 須辦理 SABER 登記 + PCoC + 每批 SCoC；中國無對應要求，出口前必須完成。

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. SABER registration and certification steps are required for Saudi market entry. [UNVERIFIED — confirm current requirements at saber.sa]
compliance_verdict.zh: 发现差距。进入沙特市场须完成 SABER 注册及认证流程。[UNVERIFIED — 请在 saber.sa 确认当前要求]
compliance_verdict.zht: 發現差距。進入沙特市場須完成 SABER 登記及認證流程。[UNVERIFIED — 請在 saber.sa 確認當前要求]

summary.en: Saudi Arabia (SASO) has adopted IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (additional requirements for inverters). A valid CB report and certificate are commonly required as a prerequisite for obtaining SABER PCoC via the SASO IECEE SIRC pathway. [UNVERIFIED — verify SASO standard number, edition, and current SIRC/SABER pathway at saso.gov.sa]
summary.zh: 沙特（SASO）已采纳 IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和 IEC 62109-2（逆变器附加要求）。有效的 CB 报告与证书通常是通过 SASO IECEE SIRC 路径获取 SABER PCoC 的前置条件。[UNVERIFIED — 请在 saso.gov.sa 核实 SASO 标准编号、版本及当前 SIRC/SABER 路径]
summary.zht: 沙特（SASO）已採納 IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和 IEC 62109-2（逆變器附加要求）。有效的 CB 報告與證書通常是透過 SASO IECEE SIRC 路徑取得 SABER PCoC 的前置條件。[UNVERIFIED — 請在 saso.gov.sa 核實 SASO 標準編號、版本及當前 SIRC/SABER 路徑]

standards_or_laws: SASO IEC 62109-1 [UNVERIFIED — edition/number to be confirmed]
SASO IEC 62109-2 [UNVERIFIED — edition/number to be confirmed]

summary.en: Many Chinese manufacturers already hold IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test reports and CB certificates obtained from accredited laboratories for CE or other market certifications.
summary.zh: 许多中国厂商已为 CE 或其他市场认证取得 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 测试报告及 CB 证书。
summary.zht: 許多中國廠商已為 CE 或其他市場認證取得 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 測試報告及 CB 證書。

gap.en: Existing IEC 62109 CB reports may be reusable; they must be referenced in the SABER PCoC application. Acceptability depends on edition, scope, and CB recognition by SASO. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: 现有 IEC 62109 CB 报告可能可复用，须在 SABER PCoC 申请中引用；能否接受取决于版本、范围及 SASO 对 CB 机构的认可情况。[UNVERIFIED]
gap.zht: 現有 IEC 62109 CB 報告可能可複用，須在 SABER PCoC 申請中引用；能否接受取決於版本、範圍及 SASO 對 CB 機構的認可情況。[UNVERIFIED]

compliance_verdict.en: Partial alignment. Existing IEC 62109 CB certificates may reduce testing burden; confirm SASO-accepted edition and CB recognition before relying on existing documents. [UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zh: 部分对应。现有 IEC 62109 CB 证书可能减少重复检测；依赖前须确认 SASO 接受的版本及 CB 机构认可状态。[UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zht: 部分對應。現有 IEC 62109 CB 證書可能減少重複檢測；依賴前須確認 SASO 接受的版本及 CB 機構認可狀態。[UNVERIFIED]

summary.en: SASO applies EMC technical regulations. Compliance evidence is required as part of the SABER conformity assessment. [UNVERIFIED — verify applicable SASO EMC regulation reference and whether a separate SASO-framed certificate is required or existing reports are accepted as technical documentation by the CB/SABER]
summary.zh: SASO 执行 EMC 技术法规，SABER 合格评定须提供相应证明。[UNVERIFIED — 请核实适用的 SASO EMC 法规编号，以及现有报告是否被 CB/SABER 接受作为技术文件，还是须重新出具 SASO 框架证书]
summary.zht: SASO 執行 EMC 技術法規，SABER 合格評定須提供相應證明。[UNVERIFIED — 請核實適用的 SASO EMC 法規編號，以及現有報告是否被 CB/SABER 接受作為技術文件，還是須重新出具 SASO 框架證書]

standards_or_laws: SASO EMC technical regulation [UNVERIFIED — regulation reference to be confirmed]

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting to Europe typically hold CE EMC test reports based on EN 61000-series standards.
summary.zh: 出口欧洲的中国厂商通常持有基于 EN 61000 系列标准的 CE EMC 测试报告。
summary.zht: 出口歐洲的中國廠商通常持有基於 EN 61000 系列標準的 CE EMC 測試報告。

gap.en: Existing CE EMC reports may be submitted as technical documentation; whether they are accepted as-is or require re-certification under a SASO framework is determined by the appointed CB and SABER. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: 现有 CE EMC 报告可能作为技术文件提交；能否直接接受或须在 SASO 框架下重新认证，由指定 CB 及 SABER 决定。[UNVERIFIED]
gap.zht: 現有 CE EMC 報告可能作為技術文件提交；能否直接接受或須在 SASO 框架下重新認證，由指定 CB 及 SABER 決定。[UNVERIFIED]

compliance_verdict.en: Partial alignment possible. Confirm with appointed CB whether CE EMC reports are accepted as technical evidence within the SABER PCoC process. [UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zh: 可能部分对应。请向指定 CB 确认 CE EMC 报告是否可作为 SABER PCoC 流程中的技术证据。[UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zht: 可能部分對應。請向指定 CB 確認 CE EMC 報告是否可作為 SABER PCoC 流程中的技術證據。[UNVERIFIED]

requirement_topic.en: Grid connection — Saudi Energy (SE) / SERA requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 并网接入 — 沙特能源公司（SE）/ SERA 要求
requirement_topic.zht: 並網接入 — 沙特能源公司（SE）/ SERA 要求

summary.en: Saudi grid operates at 60 Hz. Inverters must comply with Saudi Energy (SE, formerly Saudi Electricity Company SEC) grid interconnection specifications and SERA (Saudi Electricity Regulatory Authority, formerly WERA, renamed 2024-05-07) requirements, including frequency/voltage ride-through and anti-islanding protection settings appropriate for the Saudi grid. This is a grid-operator / regulatory requirement separate from the SABER market-access certificate. [UNVERIFIED — verify current SE/SERA technical interconnection standards and Shams Portal requirements]
summary.zh: 沙特电网频率为 60 Hz。逆变器须符合沙特能源公司（SE，前身为沙特电力公司 SEC）并网技术规范及 SERA（沙特电力监管局，前身为 WERA，于 2024-05-07 更名）要求，包括适用于沙特电网的频率/电压穿越和防孤岛保护设置。此为电网监管侧要求，独立于 SABER 市场准入证书。[UNVERIFIED — 请核实当前 SE/SERA 技术互联标准及 Shams Portal 要求]
summary.zht: 沙特電網頻率為 60 Hz。逆變器須符合沙特能源公司（SE，前身為沙特電力公司 SEC）併網技術規範及 SERA（沙特電力監管局，前身為 WERA，於 2024-05-07 更名）要求，包括適用於沙特電網的頻率/電壓穿越和防孤島保護設置。此為電網監管側要求，獨立於 SABER 市場准入證書。[UNVERIFIED — 請核實當前 SE/SERA 技術互聯標準及 Shams Portal 要求]

standards_or_laws: SE (Saudi Energy) Grid Interconnection Standards [UNVERIFIED — document reference to be confirmed]
SERA (Saudi Electricity Regulatory Authority) technical requirements [UNVERIFIED]

summary.en: Chinese and European-export inverters are typically configured for 50 Hz grids using EN 50549 or equivalent standards. Default frequency and anti-islanding settings will not match Saudi 60 Hz grid requirements.
summary.zh: 面向中国及欧洲出口的逆变器通常按 EN 50549 或同等标准配置为 50 Hz 电网，默认频率和防孤岛设置不符合沙特 60 Hz 电网要求。
summary.zht: 面向中國及歐洲出口的逆變器通常按 EN 50549 或同等標準配置為 50 Hz 電網，預設頻率和防孤島設置不符合沙特 60 Hz 電網要求。

gap.en: Significant gap. 60 Hz grid settings, frequency/voltage protection parameters, and anti-islanding must be verified against SE/SERA specifications. This is a project-level grid-access requirement in addition to SABER market-access certification. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: 存在较大差距。须按 SE/SERA 规范核实 60 Hz 电网参数、频率/电压保护整定值及防孤岛设置。此为项目级并网接入要求，与 SABER 市场准入认证并列。[UNVERIFIED]
gap.zht: 存在較大差距。須按 SE/SERA 規範核實 60 Hz 電網參數、頻率/電壓保護整定值及防孤島設置。此為項目級並網接入要求，與 SABER 市場准入認證並列。[UNVERIFIED]

source_additional.note: Renamed from WERA by Saudi Cabinet 2024-05-07

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. Grid-connection compliance requires separate verification against SE/SERA 60 Hz specifications; this is distinct from SABER market-access certification. [UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zh: 发现差距。并网合规须依据 SE/SERA 60 Hz 规范单独核实，与 SABER 市场准入认证为独立流程。[UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zht: 發現差距。並網合規須依據 SE/SERA 60 Hz 規範單獨核實，與 SABER 市場准入認證為獨立流程。[UNVERIFIED]

requirement_topic.en: Product labelling — Arabic language and energy label
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标签 — 阿拉伯语及能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標籤 — 阿拉伯語及能效標識

summary.en: Saudi regulations require product labels to be in Arabic. Where applicable under SASO energy efficiency regulations (SEEC), a Saudi energy efficiency label may also be required. [UNVERIFIED — verify current Arabic labelling regulations and whether PV inverters are within scope of SEEC energy label requirements]
summary.zh: 沙特法规要求产品标签须以阿拉伯语标注。如适用于 SASO 能效法规（SEEC）范围，还须附贴沙特能效标识。[UNVERIFIED — 请核实当前阿拉伯语标签法规及光伏逆变器是否属于 SEEC 能效标识范围]
summary.zht: 沙特法規要求產品標籤須以阿拉伯語標註。如適用於 SASO 能效法規（SEEC）範圍，還須附貼沙特能效標識。[UNVERIFIED — 請核實當前阿拉伯語標籤法規及光伏逆變器是否屬於 SEEC 能效標識範圍]

standards_or_laws: SASO Arabic labelling regulation [UNVERIFIED — regulation reference to be confirmed]
SEEC energy efficiency label (if within scope) [UNVERIFIED]

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers typically label products in Chinese and English. No Arabic labelling requirement applies in China or under CE marking.
summary.zh: 中国厂商通常以中文和英文标注产品，中国及 CE 认证均无阿拉伯语标签要求。
summary.zht: 中國廠商通常以中文和英文標註產品，中國及 CE 認證均無阿拉伯語標籤要求。

gap.en: New Arabic labels must be produced. Energy efficiency label applicability should be confirmed with SASO/SEEC. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: 须重新制作阿拉伯语标签；是否需要能效标识须向 SASO/SEEC 确认。[UNVERIFIED]
gap.zht: 須重新製作阿拉伯語標籤；是否需要能效標識須向 SASO/SEEC 確認。[UNVERIFIED]

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. Arabic labelling is required; energy label applicability depends on whether PV inverters fall within current SEEC scope. [UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zh: 发现差距。阿拉伯语标签为强制要求；能效标识是否适用取决于光伏逆变器是否在当前 SEEC 范围内。[UNVERIFIED]
compliance_verdict.zht: 發現差距。阿拉伯語標籤為強制要求；能效標識是否適用取決於光伏逆變器是否在當前 SEEC 範圍內。[UNVERIFIED]

question.en: Is CE marking sufficient for exporting PV inverters to Saudi Arabia?
question.zh: 持有 CE 认证就足以将光伏逆变器出口到沙特阿拉伯吗？
question.zht: 持有 CE 認證就足以將光伏逆變器出口到沙特阿拉伯嗎？

answer.en: No. Saudi Arabia requires registration and certification through the SABER platform (PCoC + per-shipment SCoC). CE reports may be submitted as supporting technical documentation, but CE marking alone does not satisfy SABER requirements. Arabic labelling and SEC grid-connection requirements also apply separately. [UNVERIFIED — verify at saber.sa and saso.gov.sa]
answer.zh: 不够。沙特要求通过 SABER 平台完成注册与认证（PCoC + 每批 SCoC）。CE 报告可作为技术支持文件提交，但 CE 认证本身不满足 SABER 要求。阿拉伯语标签及 SEC 并网要求亦须分别符合。[UNVERIFIED — 请在 saber.sa 及 saso.gov.sa 核实]
answer.zht: 不夠。沙特要求透過 SABER 平台完成登記與認證（PCoC + 每批 SCoC）。CE 報告可作為技術支持文件提交，但 CE 認證本身不滿足 SABER 要求。阿拉伯語標籤及 SEC 並網要求亦須分別符合。[UNVERIFIED — 請在 saber.sa 及 saso.gov.sa 核實]

question.en: Can existing IEC 62109 test reports be reused for SABER certification?
question.zh: 现有 IEC 62109 测试报告可以用于 SABER 认证吗？
question.zht: 現有 IEC 62109 測試報告可以用於 SABER 認證嗎？

answer.en: Existing IEC 62109-1/-2 CB reports and certificates may be referenced in a SABER PCoC application. Whether they are accepted depends on the standard edition, test scope, and whether the issuing laboratory is recognized by SASO. Confirm with the appointed conformity body before relying on existing reports. [UNVERIFIED]
answer.zh: 现有 IEC 62109-1/-2 CB 报告和证书可能在 SABER PCoC 申请中引用，但能否接受取决于标准版本、检测范围及签发实验室是否获 SASO 认可。请在依赖现有报告前向指定合格评定机构确认。[UNVERIFIED]
answer.zht: 現有 IEC 62109-1/-2 CB 報告和證書可能在 SABER PCoC 申請中引用，但能否接受取決於標準版本、檢測範圍及簽發實驗室是否獲 SASO 認可。請在依賴現有報告前向指定合格評定機構確認。[UNVERIFIED]
